titles.text: Mon Coach Personnel - J'Ameliore Mon Anglais

roms.name: Mon Coach Personnel - J'Ameliore Mon Anglais (France)
Mon Coach Personnel - J'Ameliore Mon Anglais (Canada) (Fr-CA)

descriptions.text: Mon Coach Personnel: J'ameliore Mon Anglais is game designed for French-speaking users. The program offers over 1,000 interactive exercises to enhance English language skills, covering vocabulary, grammar, listening comprehension, and pronunciation. Utilizing voice recognition technology, it assesses and improves spoken English, while daily challenges and engaging activities help reinforce learning in a structured and enjoyable manner
